Beille 11oz Water Glasses Clear Tumbler Set Kitchen Essentials Glassware, 4pk

Upgrade your everyday glassware collection with this set of four 11oz Clear Tumbler Drinking Glasses from Beille, designed for both daily use and stylish entertaining. These versatile kitchen essentials are the perfect choice for serving water, sparkling water, juice and more. With a practical 11-ounce capacity and timeless design, they fit seamlessly into any home and kitchen, making them a must-have addition to your drinkware and glassware collections.

Key Features

  • EVERYDAY DRINKING GLASSES: Reach for this perfect kitchen essentials clear tumbler style glass to serve water, sparkling water, juice and much more; drinking glasses feature a capacity of 11 ounces and are sold in packs of four
  • TABLE SETTING DECOR: The classic design of these clear tumbler water glasses lends them to any kind of table setting and home décor style; easily pair or set with other glassware like wine glasses, goblets and more for a quick and elevated table setting
  • CLASSIC DESIGN: Form and function meet with here with our glass tumblers; faceted sides provide an easy to hold, slip resistant and comfortable grip, while the drinking glasses classic aesthetic boasts easy and effortless convenience or styling
  • DISHWASHER SAFE: Sturdy, durable and long lasting, these water glasses or juice glasses are designed to withstand daily use and repeated washing; top rack dishwasher safe or handwash as needed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.0 x 3.25 inches; Individual Weight: 0.54lbs; Set Weight: 2.16lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLE-TH43S05W
  • UPC: 810131709563
  • Color: Clear

The classic tumbler style make these water glasses suitable for any dining occasion. Whether used as casual water glasses for Sunday brunch (hi, fresh squeezed orange juice), or styled alongside wine glasses and goblets for a dinner party, their clear, minimalist look complements any table setting. The faceted sides add both elegance and function, providing a comfortable, slip-resistant grip that is easy to hold.

Built for everyday durability, these clear drinking glasses are sturdy, reliable, and designed to last through daily use. They are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning (simply place them on the top rack), or hand wash when preferred. Their resilience makes them an excellent choice for busy households that want style without sacrificing on functionality and practicality.

With their timeless design, versatile use, and durable construction, this set of four 11oz Clear Tumbler Glasses from Beille are the perfect balance of everyday convenience and classic style: ideal for upgrading a drinkware or glassware collection, that delivers on reliability, practicality and classic style in one simple design.
